task: Add a new contact to the CRM file at /tmp/clive/contacts.json: Name 'Kiu Chen', email 'kiu@ikangai.com', company 'ikangai UG', phone '+49 176 1234567', role 'CTO'. If the file doesn't exist, create it with an array. Write the updated JSON to /tmp/clive/result.json.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert len(d)==1; assert d[0]['email']=='kiu@ikangai.com'"

task: Search the CRM contacts file /tmp/clive/contacts.json for all contacts at company 'ikangai'. Write matching contacts as a formatted list to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Create a sales pipeline report from /tmp/clive/deals.csv. Group deals by stage (lead, qualified, proposal, negotiation, closed_won, closed_lost). Calculate total value per stage. Write the pipeline summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,company,value,stage,contact' > /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '1,Acme Corp,50000,closed_won,john@acme.com' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '2,TechStart,30000,proposal,sarah@techstart.de' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '3,GlobalFin,80000,negotiation,cfo@globalfin.com' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '4,MedTech,25000,qualified,info@medtech.de' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '5,EduSoft,15000,lead,contact@edusoft.com' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '6,AutoDrive,60000,proposal,sales@autodrive.de' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '7,FinServe,45000,closed_lost,pm@finserve.com' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '8,DataCorp,35000,negotiation,cto@datacorp.de' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv

task: Check /tmp/clive/interactions.csv for contacts that haven't been contacted in over 14 days (relative to 2026-04-09). Generate follow-up reminders. Write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'contact,email,last_contact,type' > /tmp/clive/interactions.csv && echo 'Kiu Chen,kiu@ikangai.com,2026-04-07,email' >> /tmp/clive/interactions.csv && echo 'Sarah Mueller,sarah@techstart.de,2026-03-20,call' >> /tmp/clive/interactions.csv && echo 'John Smith,john@acme.com,2026-03-15,meeting' >> /tmp/clive/interactions.csv && echo 'Lisa Park,lisa@datacorp.de,2026-04-01,email' >> /tmp/clive/interactions.csv

task: Generate a personalized email campaign from /tmp/clive/campaign_contacts.csv using /tmp/clive/campaign_template.txt. Each email should have the contact's name and company filled in. Write all generated emails to /tmp/clive/result.txt with separators between them.

initial_state.setup:
echo 'name,email,company,product_interest' > /tmp/clive/campaign_contacts.csv && echo 'Kiu Chen,kiu@ikangai.com,ikangai,Enterprise Plan' >> /tmp/clive/campaign_contacts.csv && echo 'Sarah Mueller,sarah@techstart.de,TechStart,Startup Plan' >> /tmp/clive/campaign_contacts.csv && echo 'Tom Baker,tom@globalfin.com,GlobalFin,Enterprise Plan' >> /tmp/clive/campaign_contacts.csv && echo 'Hi {{name}},

I noticed {{company}} might benefit from our {{product_interest}}.

Would you have 15 minutes for a quick call this week?

Best,
Martin' > /tmp/clive/campaign_template.txt

task: Merge two contact files (/tmp/clive/contacts_a.json and /tmp/clive/contacts_b.json) removing duplicates by email address. Keep the most recently updated record when duplicates exist. Write the merged list to /tmp/clive/result.json.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); emails=[c['email'] for c in d]; assert len(d)==3; assert len(set(emails))==3"

task: Create a CRM activity log from /tmp/clive/activities.csv. Group activities by contact, show timeline with dates and types (call, email, meeting). Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'date,contact,type,notes' > /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-01,Kiu Chen,email,Sent proposal' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-03,Kiu Chen,call,Discussed timeline' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-05,Sarah Mueller,meeting,Product demo' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-07,Kiu Chen,meeting,Contract review' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-08,Sarah Mueller,email,Follow-up on demo' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv

task: Generate a revenue forecast from /tmp/clive/deals.csv. Weight deal values by probability: lead=10%, qualified=25%, proposal=50%, negotiation=75%, closed_won=100%. Write weighted total and per-stage weighted values to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,company,value,stage' > /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '1,Acme Corp,50000,closed_won' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '2,TechStart,30000,proposal' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '3,GlobalFin,80000,negotiation' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '4,MedTech,25000,qualified' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '5,EduSoft,15000,lead' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv

task: Export all contacts from /tmp/clive/contacts.json as individual vCard (.vcf) files in /tmp/clive/vcards/. Each file named by the contact's email. Write the count of exported files to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Add tags to contacts in /tmp/clive/contacts.json based on rules: if company contains 'UG' or 'GmbH' tag as 'DACH', if role is 'CTO' or 'CEO' tag as 'executive', if last_contact is over 30 days ago tag as 'stale'. Write updated JSON to /tmp/clive/result.json.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); tags=[c.get('tags',[]) for c in d]; assert any('DACH' in t for t in tags); assert any('executive' in t for t in tags); assert any('stale' in t for t in tags)"

task: Prepare a meeting brief for a call with Kiu Chen. Pull their contact info from /tmp/clive/contacts.json, recent activities from /tmp/clive/activities.csv, and open deals from /tmp/clive/deals.csv. Write a one-page meeting prep document to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo '[{"name":"Kiu Chen","email":"kiu@ikangai.com","company":"ikangai UG","role":"CTO","notes":"Decision maker for platform team"}]' > /tmp/clive/contacts.json && echo 'date,contact,type,notes' > /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-01,Kiu Chen,email,Sent proposal' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-07,Kiu Chen,call,Discussed pricing' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo 'id,company,value,stage,contact' > /tmp/clive/deals.csv && echo '1,ikangai UG,45000,negotiation,Kiu Chen' >> /tmp/clive/deals.csv

task: Import contacts from a CSV file (/tmp/clive/import.csv) into the JSON CRM (/tmp/clive/contacts.json). Skip rows with missing email. Append only new contacts (don't duplicate existing ones). Write the final count to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo '[{"name":"Existing User","email":"existing@test.com"}]' > /tmp/clive/contacts.json && echo 'name,email,company' > /tmp/clive/import.csv && echo 'Kiu Chen,kiu@ikangai.com,ikangai' >> /tmp/clive/import.csv && echo 'Bad Row,,NoCompany' >> /tmp/clive/import.csv && echo 'Existing User,existing@test.com,TestCo' >> /tmp/clive/import.csv && echo 'New Person,new@person.com,NewCo' >> /tmp/clive/import.csv

task: Analyze win/loss data from /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv. Calculate win rate, average deal size for wins vs losses, and top reasons for losses. Write the analysis to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,company,value,outcome,reason' > /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '1,Acme,50000,won,' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '2,Beta,30000,lost,price' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '3,Gamma,80000,won,' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '4,Delta,25000,lost,competitor' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '5,Echo,60000,won,' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '6,Foxtrot,35000,lost,price' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '7,Golf,45000,won,' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv && echo '8,Hotel,20000,lost,timing' >> /tmp/clive/deals_history.csv

task: If taskwarrior (task) is installed, use it to create 3 CRM tasks: 'Call Kiu about contract', 'Send proposal to TechStart', 'Schedule demo for GlobalFin'. Set priorities H, M, L respectively. List all tasks and write output to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If taskwarrior isn't installed, use a simple todo.txt format instead.

Generate a quarterly contacts report from /tmp/clive/contacts.json and /tmp/clive/activities.csv. For each contact: total interactions this quarter, last interaction date, engagement level (high: >3, medium: 1-3, low: 0). Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: echo '[{"name":"Kiu Chen","email":"kiu@ikangai.com"},{"name":"Sarah Mueller","email":"sarah@techstart.de"},{"name":"Tom Baker","email":"tom@globalfin.com"}]' > /tmp/clive/contacts.json && echo 'date,contact_email,type' > /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-01,kiu@ikangai.com,email' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-03,kiu@ikangai.com,call' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-05,sarah@techstart.de,meeting' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-07,kiu@ikangai.com,meeting' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv && echo '2026-04-08,kiu@ikangai.com,email' >> /tmp/clive/activities.csv
